SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Aug-15-2016 Continued For Letter To Sep-26-16 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 506

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-13-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Stephen K. Lightfoot II Esq., for Plaintiff/Respondent Christopher Davies, who is also present.
Carol Mayeda Esq., for Appellant/Defendant Suchinda Kosolsuviwat, who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Christopher Davies, Plaintiff/Respondent testfies on his own behalf. The following documents
are introduced into evidence:
Exhibit 1 Lease Agreement
Exhibit 2 Letter dated 2-16-14 to Suchinda Kosolsuviwat from Christopher Davies
Exhibit 3 Rent Board letter
Exhibit 4 Letter from law firm
Exhibit 5 Average price rent alculator

Suchinda Kosolsuviwat, Appellant/Defendant testfies on her own behalf. The following documents are introduced into evidence:
Exhibit A Notice of change of terms of tenancy
Exhibit B Notice of Judgment

The Judges orders the following:
Ms. Mayeda counsel for the Appellant/Defendant will submit a brief of legal points and authorties by March 11, 2015.

Mr. Lighfoot counsel for the Plaintiff/Respondent will submit his response and/or brief of legal points and authorties by March 25, 2015.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Linda H. Colfax, Clerk: J.Murphy, Not Reported (318)
